description.en-US: Milesight VS340 — LoRaWAN (Class A) sensor that monitors people counts and occupancy / motion. Uplinks are channel-TLV frames on FPort 85. (Datasheet/user guide cover the VS34X series.)
description.pt-BR: Milesight VS340 — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) que monitora contagem de pessoas e ocupação / movimento. Os uplinks são quadros channel-TLV no FPort 85. (Datasheet/manual cobrem a série VS34X.)
